title: Angling Accessories
description: Even heroes need days off.

title: Ankexfen Cat Toys
description: Goblins may be savages, but they still spoil their fluffy friends.

title: Ankexfen Documents
description: Miscellaneous books and pages found around Ankexfen Keep.

requirements.label: How To Train Your Polar Bear

title: Ankexfen Keep Scavenger
description: This achievement is gained upon completing all collections in Ankexfen Keep.

title: Beads of Prayer
description: Beads held by ancient Elddar in honor of Mother Tunare.

title: Bump, Set, Spike!
description: The life cycle of these creatures is a marvel to behold.

title: Fern-Gullied
description: Behold the majesty of the Pal'Lomen ferns!

title: Fiery Peppers
description: The Ankexfen use these to season the corpses of their enemies.

title: Gifts for Dok
description: The goblins love making these for their leader, even if he hates them.

title: Goblin Poetry
description: Emotional literature written between razing enemy camps.

requirements.label: Death is the Thing with Feathers

title: Have a Drink on Me
description: The difference between learning and wasting time is writing it down.

requirements.label: Scrapped Kerra Isle Iced Tea Recipe

title: Hero's Forge Tools
description: The tools the forgebound use to make incredible gear.

title: Heroic Gear Components
description: A piece of armor is only as good as the sum of its parts.

title: Heroic Tales
description: Stories told in the words of the one who experienced them.

title: Laurion Inn Scavenger
description: This achievement is gained upon completing all collections in Laurion Inn.

title: Letters Lost
description: The unsent words of those lost to the Rallosians' oppression.

title: Living for Rallos
description: Everyday reminders of life amongst Rallos Zek's chosen.

title: Living Off the Land
description: Great tips for living a natural life off the land.

title: Lost Equipment
description: Sometimes things are lost in the wilds, sometimes they are taken.

title: Lost Luggage
description: It never fails. When traveling, things are lost.

title: Mind Your Steppe
description: Orders for the brew from Eureka's Tumble come from all across Norrath.

title: Moors of Nokk Scavenger
description: This achievement is gained upon completing all collections in Moors of Nokk.

title: Nokk Armory
description: The weapons of war, for the Warlord.

title: Nothing to Report, Sir!
description: A scheme is afoot in Timorous Falls. The guards are on high alert.

title: Pal'Lomen Scavenger
description: This achievement is gained upon completing all collections in Pal'Lomen.

title: Pay Your Tab
description: Upsetting Maddie is a surefire way to get heaved off of her Steppe!

title: Shiny Basilisk Scales
description: Scales shed by the basilisks of the Unkempt Woods.

title: The Hero's Forge Scavenger
description: This achievement is gained upon completing all collections in The Hero's Forge.

title: The Heroes' Portraits
description: Luckliy for our heroes, all the images are quite flattering.

title: The Ogres' Knowledge
description: The literature of the ogre people, lost to time.
